src/main/java/com/gsdd/earthquake/bean/E.general_idea: Convert synchronous service call to reactive subscribe pattern.

src/main/java/com/gsdd/earthquake/servic.general_idea: Converted the concrete service class into an interface to define the contract without implementation details.
src/main/java/com/gsdd/earthquake/servic.human_impl: Changed `public class EarthquakeService` to `public interface EarthquakeService` and removed all fields and methods.

src/main/java/com/gsdd/earthquake/servic.general_idea: Removed dependency on Spring Web's RestTemplate and related HTTP utilities.
Added dependency on Project Reactor for reactive programming support.
Updated the earthquake count query method to return a reactive Mono instead of a blocking object.
src/main/java/com/gsdd/earthquake/servic.human_impl: Changed return type of `earthquakeCountQuery` from `EarthquakeCount` to `Mono<EarthquakeCount>`.

src/main/java/com/gsdd/earthquake/servic.general_idea: Removed the concrete implementation logic for querying earthquakes.
src/main/java/com/gsdd/earthquake/servic.human_impl: Removed the body of `earthquakeQuery` and `earthquakeCountQuery` methods, leaving only signatures in the interface.

src/main/java/com/gsdd/earthquake/servic.general_idea: Removed private helper methods used for date formatting and parameter construction.
Removed static constants defining the USGS API URLs and parameters.
Removed the constructor and initialization logic for the RestTemplate headers.
src/main/java/com/gsdd/earthquake/servic.human_impl: Removed the `@Autowired` constructor and the `initRestConsumption` method.
